expectations.text: Traces the hot path / sketches the call chain
Anchors on a real measurement (object.size, timing, or profiling)
Distinguishes the persistent result from the transient peak
Extrapolates to large inputs with explicit multipliers
Labels which figures are measured versus estimated
Flags a concrete scaling risk (super-linear time, memory-bound, truncation, no caching)
Reproduces the triggering prompt in the report
Names the skill/method that produced the report
States no package files were modified (read-only)
Gives recommendations plus caveats on the estimate
